content_hints.description: The road out of Plainsworth cuts through farmland gone to seed. Fences sag, crops rot unharvested in the fields, and the farmhouses stand empty with their doors hanging open. Cart tracks rut the mud -- heavy wagons passed this way recently, heading toward the supply depot.
content_hints.read_aloud: The road stretches ahead through abandoned farmland. Cart tracks in the mud confirm a supply convoy passed this way. So did something else -- the tracks are crossed by drag marks, wide as a body.
event_triggers: Cart tracks in the mud suggest a supply convoy passed recently. The ruts are deep -- heavy cargo.

content_hints.description: A stone bridge crosses a shallow creek. On the far side, a supply wagon lies on its side, one wheel shattered. Crates are scattered across the road, some broken open, their contents trampled into the mud. The wagon's draft horse lies dead in its traces, throat torn out. The driver is nowhere to be seen.

loot.name: Salvaged Supply Crate
loot.description: Intact rations and medical supplies. Supply +1.

content_hints.investigation_success: The wagon was attacked from the tree line to the north. The Hounds flanked while the Rotters came straight down the road. This was coordinated -- something was directing them.

content_hints.description: The supply depot is a stone barn reinforced with timber bracing. Inside, stacked crates bear the quartermaster's chalk marks -- organized by type and destination. The depot is intact but unguarded. Whoever was stationed here left in a hurry; a half-eaten meal sits on the watchman's table, the bread already going stale.

loot.name: Supply Depot Stores
loot.description: A full depot's worth of rations, ammunition, and field medicine. Supply +3.

loot.name: Watchman's Journal
loot.description: The last entry reads: 'Movement on the south road. Too many to count. Heading for the shrine.'

event_triggers: The depot door was barred from the inside. Someone left through the back window.
